chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4038 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 16673/2021 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2025 Mr. Usman Alam, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ayaz Sarwar Jamali, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, this petition assails show cause notice. Learned counsel states that the petitioner shall contest the show cause notice before the issuing authority, however, seeks that the same be decided vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper for the respondents not to take any coercive action against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
